title: Smart Friendly Boarding System
subtitle: Real-time platform guidance demo (powered by TDX Open Data)
serverHint: Point to PC running node server.js, e.g. http://192.168.0.10:3000 on same Wi‑Fi
destHint: Shows trains from origin that stop at this station (TDX timetable)
wheelchairHint: ♿ Use step-free entrances and elevators to the platform (illustrative text, not real-time routing).
emptyPrompt: Select a station and search to see real-time TDX departures.
emptyRoute: No trains stopping at this station. Try All direction or leave destination empty.
reassuranceOk: On time or just a few minutes late — your train is coming soon
reassuranceModerate: Slightly delayed — please wait at platform {platform}
reassuranceModerateNoPlatform: Slightly delayed — watch the platform display
reassuranceSevere: Major delay — here is what you can do
carNote: ＊Car layout is illustrative. Follow on-site platform signs (TDX has no car-level positioning).
footer: Data: MOTC TDX Platform ｜ Car layout is simulated, not from TDX.
statusStationNotFound: Cannot find "{name}". Try the short name (e.g. Tongxiao) or tap the field to browse.
statusTdxMissing: ⚠️ TDX Client ID / Secret not configured in .env.
statusFileProtocol: ⚠️ Do not open index.html directly. Run node server.js in tdx-app, then open http://localhost:3000
statusSecretMissing: ⚠️ Client ID is set but Client Secret is missing. Edit tdx-app/.env and restart the server.
statusConnFail: Cannot connect to server. Run node server.js.
